A.text: The top and middle balls remain connected, but the bottom ball separates.

B.text: All three balls remain attached as a single piece.

C.text: All three balls detach and fall off as separate pieces.

D.text: The bottom and middle balls remain connected, but the top ball separates.

parsed.answer_value: The top and middle balls remain connected, but the bottom ball separates.
parsed.rationale: The cut is made through the curved tube halfway between the top and middle balls, which means the connection between the top and middle balls is not severed. However, the bottom ball is separated from the rest of the structure by this cut.
